trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: add an end-to-end integration test proving the student submit -> teacher revision -> student resubmit -> teacher approval loop persists review/status history and updates the teacher queue.
scope: Prove the Day 7 alpha teacher review loop at the API layer by adding an integration test that submits a draft, requests revision, resubmits with a version bump, approves, and asserts queue membership plus persisted reviews + status history. Update docs to record the new evidence and keep the run verifiable via the standard test runner.
changes: Added tests/review-loop.integration.test.mjs to exercise an end-to-end teacher review loop: student submit -> teacher revision request -> student resubmit (version++) -> teacher approval, asserting teacher queue membership and persisted reviews + status_history records.
Updated review-related Pages Functions to use explicit .ts import specifiers so Node can import route handlers during integration tests.
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md, docs/automation-memory.md, and docs/progress/run-log.md to record the new MVP-015 evidence.
known_limits: The hosted alpha walkthrough still needs manual verification that the UI can complete the review loop without code edits using the seeded/demo personas or fake .test accounts.
next_actions: Add integration coverage for review denial (out-of-scope teacher, misc-admin) and out-of-order transitions once the core loop is stable.
Verify the hosted alpha walkthrough completes the review loop and that dashboard counts are derived from DB state (not client-only).
